ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "rated" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R, G) */,
  "released" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer of the movie */,
  "actors" TEXT /* Main actors in the movie */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Plot summary of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken in the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and nominations received by the movie */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Response to the movie (e.g., True, False) */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office_collection" INTEGER /* Box office collection of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Additional certification details (e.g., MPAA rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_awards FOREIGN KEY ("awards") REFERENCES awards ("award_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_actors FOREIGN KEY ("actors") REFERENCES actors ("actor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer FOREIGN KEY ("writer") REFERENCES writers ("writer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 8.4/10, 95%, 95/100) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews that contributed to the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the language */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the language is primarily spoken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Name of the recipient (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)
column_names: Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R, G)
Runtime of the movie in minutes
Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama)
Awards and nominations received by the movie
